The '''Zorbian space pirates''' were a disorganized group of [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] from [[Zorbia II]]. They were believed to be of [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] descent, and had proven to be nuisance in the [[Moddell sector/Legends|Moddell sector]] for centuries.

One group led by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Krag (Zorbian)|Krag]] embarked on an expedition to raid [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]] for its valuable [[gemwood tree]]. They used [[Axe/Legends|axes]] and [[Bola/Legends|bolo-slings]] as weapons, and after capturing most of the village's fighting-age males, the group nearly obtained the valuable gemwood tree until thwarted by [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Kneesaa]] and the women and children of the village.
